{"id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.3","title":"All impls: TDMA slot scheduling","description":"Implement TDMA slot scheduling in all three codebases.

## Shared logic
1. Beacon RX and time sync
2. Slot assignment parsing
3. TX queue holds packets until assigned slot
4. Contention slot fallback for unassigned nodes

## Python (python/src/lichen/)
- Add tdma/ module with SlotScheduler
- Integrate with link layer TX path

## Rust (rust/src/)
- Add tdma module
- Integrate with radio abstraction

## Zephyr (lichen/subsys/lichen/)
- Add tdma/ subsystem
- Use Zephyr k_timer for slot timing
- Kconfig: CONFIG_LICHEN_TDMA_ENABLED

## Gateway role
- Beacon TX at superframe start
- Slot assignment algorithm
- Track active nodes for dynamic assignment","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:57.482641Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:57.482641Z","labels":["python","rust","zephyr","implementation","phy","protocol","scalability"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:57.659188Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-i9r0.1","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-07-16T18:20:57.793658Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","metadata":"{}"}]}
new_value: {"notes":"Production implementation is blocked until both project-LICHEN-i9r0.2 and project-LICHEN-da2q.3 pass the canonical CCP-16 simulator gates."}

new_value: {"acceptance_criteria":"Cross-implementation vectors match; all CCP-16 gates remain green; Linux Zephyr native_sim and supported hardware builds pass; mixed legacy behavior and fail-closed GNSS/schedule handling are verified.","description":"After i9r0.2 and da2q.3 pass, implement CCP v1 scheduled mode in Python, Rust, and Zephyr: GNSS hardware-PPS capture and holdover, exact capability/control codecs and signatures, recipient-paged schedule state, root authority/replay handling, slot execution/CAD, per-channel regulatory budgets, queue integration, and CH0 fallback. Nodes without valid GNSS-PPS MUST remain baseline-compatible. Do not implement gateway timing beacons, static hash reservations, or same-channel spatial reuse.","design":"Implement spec/02a-coordinated-capacity.md exactly from canonical vectors generated by the simulator phase. Preserve no_std/fixed-capacity constraints and existing baseline behavior when CCP is disabled.","title":"All impls: GNSS-PPS CCP scheduling"}
